zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：高位震荡中的温和上行结构
zh.content:
当前维持高位震荡偏强格局，价格运行在69美元附近，整体仍处于短期上升后的整理阶段。近期波动区间收窄在68.5至69.6之间，显示多空进入短暂平衡状态，但低点逐步抬高，结构上仍偏向多头占优，尚未出现明显趋势反转信号。

从均线与动能来看，价格稳定站上SMA(20)=67.918，构成短线动态支撑，说明趋势基础仍在。MACD数值为正，动能柱偏强，显示多头动能仍在延续。不过RSI缺失使超买状态难以确认，当前需警惕高位动能衰减后的震荡加剧。

支撑与阻力方面，第一支撑位关注68.4附近，其次为67.9均线支撑；若跌破则可能回踩66区间。上方阻力集中在69.6前高，突破后将打开70整数关口空间，进一步有望测试71–72区域，但需要成交量配合确认。

交易策略上，短线可采取区间思路，高抛低吸为主。若放量突破69.6并站稳，可顺势轻仓追多，止损设于68.4下方；若冲高受阻回落，则关注68.5附近低吸机会。当前不宜盲目追高，等待方向确认更为稳妥。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
is maintaining a short-term bullish consolidation after a modest 24h gain of 1.28%, with price stabilizing near 69.38. Structure suggests a gradual uptrend as candles hold above the 20-period SMA at 67.918, indicating buyers remain in control on pullbacks. However, momentum is not strongly extended, implying a range-bound climb rather than impulsive breakout conditions at this stage. Volatility remains contained, favoring swing traders over aggressive breakout positioning.

MACD reads 0.467, reflecting positive momentum and confirming a mild bullish bias in the short term. The absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold assessment, but price behavior near highs suggests controlled strength rather than exhaustion. With MACD above zero, momentum still favors continuation, though the lack of strong acceleration signals warns that upside moves may be gradual and prone to intraday pullbacks.

Immediate support is forming at 68.48, aligned with recent intraday lows, while stronger structural support sits at the 20-SMA near 67.918. On the upside, resistance is evident at 69.64, with a psychological barrier at 70. A sustained break above 70 could open momentum toward higher continuation levels, while failure to hold 68.48 risks a retracement toward the SMA zone. Market reaction at these levels will likely define near-term directional bias.

Trading conditions favor a controlled range strategy, with dip accumulation near 68.50–67.90 support zone for bullish continuation setups. Conservative traders may wait for a decisive break above 70 to confirm breakout momentum before adding exposure. Risk management remains key, with stops ideally placed below the 67.90 SMA to avoid structural breakdown exposure. Profit-taking near 69.60–70 resistance is recommended in short-term trades.
